title: Decide external CommandCenterUI boundary
description: Gap-plan increment 5: create a durable decision artifact clarifying whether the next command-center UI work stays in MAP_System's mission-control TUI or requires explicit operator approval to edit the external /home/home/Projects/CommandCenterUI project.
acceptance_criteria: Decision artifact names the external CommandCenterUI path, current MAP-side TUI scope, and why external edits are out of scope without operator approval.
Artifact gives concrete options and a recommended default for the next phase.
Artifact defines what approval/evidence is required before any agent edits /home/home/Projects/CommandCenterUI.
